advancedPage.title: BSD-YBM’s deep tools are organized here without cluttering your daily workspace.
advancedPage.subtitle: The default is the `/app` environment, but when you need deeper control, advanced analysis, or expert tools, everything is grouped in one clear place.

onboarding.title: Smart onboarding
onboarding.body: A setup wizard that turns your organization’s state into clear steps: trade, connections, subscription, portal, and documents.

automations.title: Automation Center
automations.body: One hub for automations, recommended scripts, and flows tied to documents, billing, and clients.

portal.title: Client Portal
portal.body: Manage the public portal, domain, document sharing, and what clients see outside the internal app.

inbox.title: Advanced control center

clients.title: Advanced CRM

ai.title: Advanced AI Hub

settings.title: Advanced settings
settings.body: The full settings center for areas that need finer control over org and integrations.

operations.title: Advanced operations
operations.body: Workflows, team deep tools, and processes across departments or systems.

meckano.title: Meckano
meckano.body: The dedicated field module stays here as an advanced workspace for entitled subscribers only.
